snippets.text_snippet: Sense inventory includes wheel center, distribution point, activity center, and network device.
Derived-term inventory includes hub-and-spoke, hubbed, hubbing, hubcap, and datahub.
Modern dictionary sense covers a city through which airline traffic is routed.
Modern dictionary sense covers a computer-network connection device.
Modern learner entry emphasizes the central or main part where activity is concentrated.
Modern dictionary sense includes a transport interchange and activity center.
